_note: Canned deterministic replay tape — HEALTHY FV feed. Fresh FV arrivals interleave the fixed non-FV cadence. Under arm A (guard_enabled=False) these FV rows are INVISIBLE (guard-off projection returns None without reading the cache, per E3-T4), so this tape's baseline-arm decision stream is byte-identical to tape_stale/tape_absent. Under arm B (guard_enabled=True) the FV leg populates and the stream differs (non-vacuity contrast). Microstructure (bid/ask/sizes) is arm-identical and fixed across ticks.
